text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm taking a walk along the<n>river, when...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: HEEEEEY! GET BACK HERE!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
YOU CAN'T RUN, MCQUEEN! I KNOW<n>WHAT
YOU'VE DONE!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Is she going to chase me all<n>day?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey! Admit it! Admit to your crimes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: N-never! I didn't do anything!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Is that how it's going to be? Then I'll<n>do it for you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You sneakily finished off all the cake!<n>Even though
you're supposed to be<n>on a diet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Agh! No! Please, say no more!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Look, I'm not a monster. Iwon't rat you out to your trainer.However...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There is one thing you need to know...<n>You
listening?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Salmon! You must learn from and live<n>by the
salmon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...See, the thing about salmon is they<n>spend their
lives swimming upstream.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, that doesn't make sense to us,<n>does it? I
mean, why tire yourself out<n>like that?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But the salmon still do it... And do you<n>know why?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Uhh... no? What are you on about,<n>anyway?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The salmon see adversity as<n>opportunity! A
chance to grow and<n>realize their potential!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So, swim upstream! Just like the<n>salmon! BE the
salmon!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So you ate the last of the cake—fine!<n>But you
should use this chance to<n>work on yourself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wait...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Time to burn that cake's calories... No,<n>make that
two cakes' worth! Then<n>you're on your way to
being an<n>incredible runner!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes... Yes, you're right!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I am merely a student of the salmon<n>myself. I still
have yet to reach their<n>level of zen.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
However, one day it will happen! I<n>shall face
adversity as the salmon do<n>and become a mighty
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
To that end, I run! Until that day when<n>my dreams
finally come true...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship... I finally understand what<n>you're trying
to say!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume should always keep<n>their fighting
passion... and they<n>should always view challenges
as<n>opportunities!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Which is why I'll use these calories<n>to run, and—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh! I think I see Flash over there!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
HALT! TODAY'S THE DAY I FINALLY<n>EAT MORE
SAUSAGES THAN YOUUU!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wha—hey! Gold Ship?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Well, I see what fighting<n>passion looks like
now, but you must<n>learn to remain calm!
